Each SEL Axion system requires an RTAC module to serve as the system CPU.
Every SEL Axion node requires at least one SEL-2243 Power Coupler module. The SEL-2243 serves two purposes in an Axion system.
The SEL-2244-2 module includes 24 optoisolated, dry contact inputs with LED indicators. Up to nine modules may be used in a node.

moduleTypes.model: SEL-2244-3 Standard Current Digital Output Module
moduleTypes.description: The SEL-2244-3 module includes 16 contact outputs with LED indicators. Up to nine modules may be used in a node. Form A and Form B outputs.

moduleTypes.model: SEL-2244-5 Fast High-Current Digital Output Module

moduleTypes.description: The SEL-2245-2 module includes 16 inputs that are software-selectable for input ranges of 20 mA, 2 mA, or +10 V.

moduleTypes.model: SEL-2245-22 DC Analog Input Extended-Range Module
moduleTypes.description: The SEL-2245-22 module includes four inputs for measuring 0-300 Vdc signals. This makes them ideal for monitoring battery voltage.
The SEL-2245-221 module provides four inputs for voltage or current monitoring applications.
The SEL-2245-3 module includes eight software-selectable current or voltage outputs.
The SEL-2245-4 module includes four CT and four PT inputs with ranges of 0-22 A and 5-400 VL-N at a typical accuracy of 0.1 percent.

moduleTypes.model: SEL-2245-411 Standard Current and Low-Voltage (LEA) Monitoring Module
moduleTypes.description:
The SEL-2245-411 module includes the same current inputs as the SEL-2245-4 AC Metering Module with four low-voltage inputs to support low-energy
analog (LEA) voltage measurements.
The SEL-2245-42 module includes three CTs with isolated returns and includes three PTs (or VTs) for measuring ac signals.
